title: The TNAZEP Flavour
description: Minecraft Vanilla with minor additions, Based on Fabulously optimized!
body:
This modpack is primarily made for the TNAZEP Minecraft server (currently private) and is a collection of QoL, Optimization and Vanilla+ mods.

The Pack is based on Fabolously optimized and they deserve all the credit in the world for their fantastic work!


Version number Structure: X.Y.Z

X = Major Minecraft version number starting from 1.20
Y = Minor Minecraft version number.
Z = Modpack version number for that Major.Minor Minecraft version

Example: The TNAZEP Flavour 1.4.2 is the second version of the modpack for Minecraft 1.20.4, TNAZEP Flavour 2.0.0 will be the first version of the modpack for 1.21.0
